mapper.sql: id, pool_code, name, model_type, selection_strategy, status, remark
mapper.select:
select from model_pools
and ( pool_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or remark like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
and model_type in
#{type}
order by id desc

select count(1) from model_pools where pool_code = #{poolCode}
and id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: insert into model_pools(pool_code, name, model_type, selection_strategy, status, remark) values(#{poolCode}, #{name}, #{modelType}, #{selectionStrategy}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update model_pools set pool_code = #{poolCode}, name = #{name}, model_type = #{modelType}, selection_strategy = #{selectionStrategy}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select mpi.id, mpi.pool_id, mpi.model_id, mpi.weight, mpi.priority, mpi.status, m.model_code, m.name as model_name, m.model_type, m.provider_id, p.name as provider_name from model_pool_items mpi inner join models m on mpi.model_id = m.id left join providers p on m.provider_id = p.id where mpi.pool_id = #{poolId} order by mpi.priority asc, mpi.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into model_pool_items(pool_id, model_id, weight, priority, status) values(#{poolId}, #{modelId}, #{weight}, #{priority}, #{status})
